hero.description: Experience world-class healthcare by connecting with expert doctors and nurses. We're committed to your well-being every step of the way.

services.title: Our Medical Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive healthcare solutions tailored to meet your needs with excellence and compassion.

doctorBooking.title: Book a Doctor
doctorBooking.desc: Book appointments with trusted doctors across 10+ medical specialties at your convenience.

homeNursing.title: Home Nursing Services
homeNursing.desc: Receive professional nursing care at home, including injections, wound care, elderly care, and post-treatment support.

aiAssistant.title: AI Medical Assistant
aiAssistant.desc: Get instant answers to general medical questions and assistance with using MedWasla anytime.

appointmentReminders.title: Appointment Reminders
appointmentReminders.desc: Stay on top of your healthcare with timely reminders so you never miss an upcoming appointment.

why.title: Why Choose
why.description: We bridge the gap between patients and healthcare professionals — making quality medical care accessible, fast, and personal.

expertNetwork.title: Expert Medical Network
expertNetwork.desc: Access to board-certified doctors and nurses with years of specialized experience.

instantMatching.title: Instant Matching
instantMatching.desc: Our platform connects you to the right medical professional within minutes.

patientCentered.title: Patient-Centered
patientCentered.desc: Personalized care tailored to your needs, all managed through one easy platform.

availability247.title: 24/7 Availability
availability247.desc: Round-the-clock access to healthcare professionals whenever you need them most.

reviews.title: What Our Patients Say
reviews.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it — hear from some of our satisfied patients.

review1.text: MedWasla connected me with an amazing cardiologist within hours. The process was seamless and the doctor was exceptional.
review1.name: Mai Islam

review2.text: Finding a specialist used to take weeks. Through MedWasla I had an appointment the same day. Truly outstanding service.
review2.name: Hazem Fahmy

review3.text: I've used MedWasla for my whole family. The nurses they connected us with were professional, caring, and highly skilled.
review3.name: Hend Mohamed

cta.title: Ready to Take Control of Your Health?
cta.descriptionBooking: Book an appointment with our expert doctors today and experience healthcare excellence.
cta.descriptionDashboard: Manage your schedule, appointments, and profile from your professional dashboard.
